title: Income Tax Services in Manipur | Virtual Auditor
description: Income Tax Services in Manipur. From ₹1,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, not. Contact +91 99622 60333.
bodyText:
What is income tax filing & appeal services? Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, notice replies, CIT(A) and ITAT appeal representation.
Income Tax Filing & Appeal Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Manipur, Manipur since 2012.
Quick Answer: Income Tax Services in Manipur — Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, notice replies, CIT(A) and ITAT appeal repr. From ₹1,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Income Tax Filing & Appeal Services in Manipur
Virtual Auditor provides income tax filing & appeal services across Manipur. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Manipur with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Shillong handles company registrations and filings for Manipur. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Manipur
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your income tax services is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which ITR form should I file?
faqs.a: ITR-1 for salaried (up to ₹50L), ITR-2 for capital gains/multiple properties, ITR-3 for business income, ITR-4 for presumptive taxation.

faqs.q: What is the due date for ITR filing?
faqs.a: 31st July for individuals (non-audit), 31st October for audit cases, 30th November for transfer pricing.

faqs.q: Can you represent me in income tax appeals?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle CIT(A) appeals, ITAT appeals, Section 264 revisions, and settlement commission applications.

faqs.q: Do you provide income tax services services in Manipur?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Manipur from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Manipur?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Manipur fall under ROC Shillong. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Manipur-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Manipur?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Manipur: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
